title: Spicy Silky Romantic Parmigiano-reggiano Stir-fry
description: A keto-friendly and romantic Slovakian dish featuring spicy flavors with a silky texture, made with Parmigiano-Reggiano, toasted walnuts, and other ingredients.

ingredients.name: Parmigiano-Reggiano cheese
ingredients.notes: Ensure it's fully grated for a silky texture.

ingredients.name: Spicy Italian chilli peppers
ingredients.notes: Can use any level of spiciness preferred.

ingredients.name: Egg whites
ingredients.notes: Use for a silky texture and to add richness.

ingredients.name: Toasted walnuts
ingredients.notes: For added crunch and depth of flavor.

ingredients.name: Keto-friendly oil or butter
ingredients.notes: Any high-heat cooking fat suitable for keto.

instructions: Heat the cooking fat in a skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the finely chopped spicy peppers and minced garlic (if using).
Stir-fry for about 2 minutes until fragrant.
Add grated Parmigiano-Reggiano, beaten egg whites, salt, and white pepper. Stir continuously to combine and coat with cheese.
Gradually incorporate toasted walnuts and continue stirring until everything is well-combined and heated through, around 3-5 more minutes.
Remove from heat and serve hot.
